milestones.title: Verified local and public maintenance release

tasks.title: Show one control window on manual launch and reopen
acceptance: A stopped app relaunches from its icon and shows current state
A running hidden app shows the same window when its icon is clicked again
tasks.done_definition: AppKit implementation, static contracts, and live launch/reopen evidence all pass
failure_conditions: Opening the icon changes the power mode
The global shortcut enables the mode from OFF
Login produces an unwanted foreground window
evidence_required: pmset state before and after display-only checks
not_proven_boundaries: Sleep blockers created by unrelated applications
tasks.change_trigger: User reports that the app icon appears to do nothing and the resident app appears to disappear
regression_checks: menu toggle strings and hot key contract
tasks.rollback_or_recovery: Reinstall version 1.2.1 from git tag or commit 263c217 and restore its launch-agent plist

tasks.title: Verify build, install, relaunch, reopen, and preserved OFF state
acceptance: AI OFF remains unchanged during display-only checks
tasks.done_definition: Automated and live verification evidence is recorded
not_proven_boundaries: Behavior on macOS versions older than the declared minimum

tasks.title: Replace the installed old bundle and publish through main
acceptance: Only one installed app bundle remains
Public GitHub main contains the verified change
tasks.done_definition: Installed and public canonical versions match the merged commit

tasks.title: Build and verify the Japanese distribution landing page
acceptance: The page links to the public GitHub repository and main source ZIP
Apple Silicon, macOS 13+, source-only distribution, and clamshell boundaries are explicit
Build, rendered HTML tests, lint, and production dependency audit pass
tasks.done_definition: Validated LP source and social card are committed with the app repository
not_proven_boundaries: Clamshell behavior on every Mac model

tasks.title: Publish the distribution site and link it from GitHub
acceptance: GitHub main contains the exact published LP source
tasks.done_definition: Public URL and GitHub source are live
